summary_text: `tests/` is green: `195 passed, 0 failed`. I applied the requested test-only fixes in the working tree and verified them with: ```bash ./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30 ./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20 ``` `python` was not available in this shell, so I used the repo venv interpreter. The relevant test files are [tests/test_apply_post_package.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_apply_post_package.py) and [tests/test_auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_auto_generator.py). There was nothing left to stage or commit by the time verification finished: the requested test-file changes are already present in `HEAD`, and `HEAD` already matches `origin/main`. `git push origin main` returned `Everything up-to-date`.
